app.name: Moa 365
app.tagline: One line a day. Your journey.

s1.head: Just one line, bookkeeping done.
s1.sub: No category picking, no bank linking. Just write.

s2.head: The AI sorts it for you.
s2.sub: Date, amount, category — all read from one line.

landing.subtitle: Type "latte $5" and you're done. AI sorts the category, amount and date for you, and a monthly coach helps you build better spending habits.
landing.uspSubtitle: One minute a day. Rediscover your month.
landing.uspChatDesc: Write "lunch $9" naturally and the AI sorts the category, amount and date. Receipt photos too.
landing.uspCalendarDesc: Actual and upcoming spend on one screen. See what you really have left until next payday.
landing.uspMapDesc: Leave ratings, photos and notes on places you visit. Clearly see where to return and where to skip.
landing.uspCoachDesc: Record regrets, wins and next month's pledge — the AI coach compares with last month and offers warm insights.
landing.cta2Heading: Start today and notice the difference this month.
landing.cta2Subtitle: Signup in 30 seconds. No credit card. Free during beta.
landing.footerTagline: One line a day. Your journey.

hero.subtitle: No spreadsheets. No receipts. Just type "latte $5" and Moa sorts it out, then walks you through your month with you.
hero.privacy: 🔒 We never connect to your bank or card. Only what you type is stored in your account — and it's never used to train AI.

problem.label: Why Moa
problem.title: Why does everyone give up on budgeting?
problem.subtitle: Most apps quit on you the same way — too many taps, no insight, no rhythm.

card1.quote: Pick a category, type the amount, set the date — three taps for every coffee. I lasted one week.

card2.quote: At month-end I just see a wall of numbers. No idea what to actually do next month.

card3.quote: I log everything, but a month later it's gone. I've never once actually looked back.

feature1.label: Feature 01 · Chat input
feature1.title: Stop tapping categories. Just type.
feature1.desc: Throw a sentence at Moa the way you already think it. AI breaks out the category, amount, date and place.
feature1.point3: One tap to fix if it gets it wrong
feature1.demoAi: Logged! You've spent $32 on cafés this month — a bit above usual :)
feature1.demoPlaceholder: Tell me what you spent today…

feature2.label: Feature 02 · Calendar
feature2.title: Actual + upcoming on one screen.
feature2.desc: Rent, subscriptions, anything recurring — already reflected. See exactly what's left until payday.
feature2.point2: Auto-calculated balance to next pay date

feature3.label: Feature 03 · Day detail
feature3.title: A day, sorted clearly.
feature3.desc: See a day broken out by category, place and note. Where your money leaks becomes obvious.
feature3.point1: 9 fixed categories — café, food, transit and more
feature3.point2: Auto place detection with rating & notes
feature3.point3: Attach photos for receipts or items

feature4.label: Feature 04 · Places
feature4.title: Map your favorites. Skip the rest.
feature4.desc: Rate and comment on places you visit — your next ledger uses that automatically. Frequent spots, all in one view.

feature5.label: Feature 05 · AI coaching
feature5.title: A warm AI coach, every month.
feature5.desc: Log wins, regrets and next-month pledges. Moa compares with last month and replies in a friend's voice.
feature5.point2: A "you're doing great" tone, not nagging
feature5.point3: One concrete action to try next month
feature5.messageSub: It closes the month the way a friend would — "thanks for logging this month too."
feature5.strength: Café spend dropped 18% vs. last month. Nice work!
feature5.weakness: Food was 32% above usual — more eating out.
feature5.advice: Try a weekly home-cooking day. About $120 in savings.

feature6.label: Feature 06 · Balance
feature6.title: Income − spend − savings = what's actually yours.
feature6.desc: Set aside fixed costs and savings first. What's left is what you can truly spend.
feature6.point1: Income, spend and savings in one table

feature7.label: Feature 07 · Recurring
feature7.title: Set once. Done until the end date.
feature7.desc: Rent, subscriptions, insurance — register them once and they fill your calendar all the way to the end date.
feature7.point2: Auto-fills calendar to the end date
feature7.point3: Batch save edits in one go

compare.label: Compare
compare.title: What makes Moa different?
compare.subtitle: Side by side with typical budgeting apps and spreadsheets.

persona1.name: The Nth-try budgeter
persona1.desc: You've tried 3+ apps and quit each in a week. Easy input is what makes you stick.

persona2.name: Early-career earner
persona2.desc: Your paycheck shows up and vanishes. The AI coach makes sense of your month.

persona3.name: Living or traveling abroad
persona3.desc: Multiple currencies and languages. Moa speaks 9 — log naturally either way.

cta2.title: Start before this month ends.
cta2.subtitle: 30-second signup, no card on file, free during beta.

login.subtitle: Log in and start your ledger.
login.notVerified: Email verification required. Please check the email you received at signup.

verifyPending.title: Check your email
verifyPending.body: We've sent a verification link to your email. Open the link to finish setting up your account. If you don't see it, check the spam folder. The link is valid for 24 hours.
verifyPending.resendFailed: Couldn't resend. Please try again in a moment.
verifyPending.hint: After verifying, log in to start tracking your spending.

accountDeletion.title: Delete account & data
accountDeletion.subtitle: Instructions for permanently deleting your Moa AI Ledger account and related data.
accountDeletion.method1Body: The fastest path if you can still sign in. No additional identity check required.
accountDeletion.method1Step1: Open the 'MY' tab in the app
accountDeletion.method1Note: Sign-in is blocked immediately on request; all data is permanently purged within 30 days.
accountDeletion.method2Title: Method 2 · Email request (if you can't access the app)
accountDeletion.method2Body: Email us from the address you signed up with and we'll verify and process the request.
accountDeletion.method2Note: Please send from the same email you used to sign up so we can confirm identity. Processed within 7 business days.
accountDeletion.deletedItem1: Account info (email, nickname, password hash, country/currency/locale)
accountDeletion.deletedItem2: Ledger entries (amount, category, date, memo, receipt photos)
accountDeletion.deletedItem3: Monthly reflections, next-month commitments, plan data
accountDeletion.deletedItem5: Subscription/payment tokens (Lemon Squeezy customer ID, Toss billing key, etc.)
accountDeletion.retainedDataBody: Some data is legally required to be kept. We isolate it in a separate store and auto-purge it after the retention period.
accountDeletion.retainedItem1: E-commerce Act: payment & refund records — 5 years
accountDeletion.retainedItem2: Communications Privacy Act: sign-in access logs — 3 months
accountDeletion.retainedNote: Retained data is never used for analytics or marketing, and identifier keys are anonymized.
accountDeletion.partialTitle: Delete only some data (keep your account)
accountDeletion.partialSubtitle: Use this if you want to remove specific data without closing your account.
accountDeletion.partialMethod1Title: Method 1 · Per-item deletion in the app (instant)
accountDeletion.partialItem1: Ledger entries: tap the trash icon next to an entry in the calendar
accountDeletion.partialItem2: Reflection notes: tap the × next to a note in the Review tab
accountDeletion.partialItem3: Plans / upcoming expenses: tap delete next to an item in the Plan tab
accountDeletion.partialItem4: Receipt or place photos: tap × next to a photo in the entry detail
accountDeletion.partialItem5: Place reviews & ratings: clear the review text or set rating to 0 in the place detail
accountDeletion.partialMethod2Body:
If you want to remove a date range or whole category at once, email master@aitrend.kr from the address you signed up with, including:
• Your sign-up email (for identity check)
• What you want deleted (e.g. "all 2024 ledger entries", "all places data")
accountDeletion.partialMethod2Note: Processed within 7 business days after identity check. You'll get a confirmation email at your sign-up address.
accountDeletion.timelineInAppValue: Instant deactivation + permanent purge within 30 days (whole account) / instant permanent delete (per item)
accountDeletion.timelineEmailValue: Within 7 business days after identity check

verifyEmail.successBody: You can now log in and start using Moa.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.locationOptInBody: Allow Claude to use approximate location metadata (city / region) to improve product experience. Precise coordinates are never used — only IP-based estimation.
privacy.activeNote: ✓ Currently on — used to auto-suggest nearby places when you log an entry.
privacy.inactiveNote: ○ Off — IP-based location estimation is not used.

location.title: Location
location.intro: When you attach a place to a ledger entry, nearby locations are suggested first based on your IP (mobile / desktop). If the result is inaccurate, you can search or pick on the map from the place detail screen.
location.disabledNotice: Location metadata is disabled. Allow it under the Privacy tab to enable automatic estimation.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Take a quick look here first if something's unclear.

items.a: It's free for now. All core features are available at no cost during the beta. If a paid plan is introduced later, existing users will be notified in advance.
Passwords are one-way hashed with bcrypt and every connection runs over HTTPS. Only anonymised stats are sent to the Anthropic Claude API for AI categorisation and insights.

items.q: Can I use the same ledger on multiple devices?
items.a: Yes. Sign in with your email and password anywhere — your data stays in sync. Mobile browsers work the same way.

Just type freely, like "Starbucks 6500", and Claude AI sorts the category, amount, and date for you. At month-end, an AI coach also surfaces spending-pattern insights. AI results are for reference and may not be 100% accurate.
Yes. Tap the camera icon in the chat input to upload a receipt — the AI extracts items and amounts and adds them to your ledger automatically.

items.q: Does it auto-sync with banks or card companies?
items.a: Not yet. Open banking links (Kakao Bank, Toss, etc.) are on the v2 roadmap. For now, chat entries or receipt photos are the fastest path.

items.q: What happens to my data when I delete my account?
items.a: All ledger entries, photos, and reflections are permanently deleted immediately on account deletion. If applicable laws (e-commerce act, etc.) require retention, the data is kept separately for that period and then destroyed.

items.q: Can I export my data as CSV or Excel?
items.a: Planned for v1.5. After the beta ends, every user keeps the right to take their data with them.
Tap "Forgot password?" on the login screen — we'll email you a reset link. Check your spam or promotions tab if you don't see it. The link is valid for 60 minutes after sending.

items.q: Can I share a ledger with my family or partner?
items.a: Shared / group ledgers are on the v2 roadmap. For now, one ledger per account is recommended.

items.q: Where do I send feedback or questions?
items.a: Email {{email}}. Bug reports, improvement ideas, and new feature requests are all welcome.

recurring.title: Recurring expenses
recurring.helpText: Register a recurring expense once (monthly/weekly/yearly) and it shows up on the calendar automatically. E.g., loan interest on the 16th, weekly Monday lunch club fees.

validation.missingEndDateTitle: {{count}} recurring expense(s) missing an end date.
validation.missingEndDateBody: Without an end date the calendar can't display them correctly. Fill in the "End date" column on the highlighted rows.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.subtitle: How and when refunds are granted at Moa AI Ledger.
refund.section1Body: Within 7 days of payment you may withdraw your subscription per Article 17 of the Korean E-Commerce Act and receive a full refund. The right may be restricted if more than 30% of paid features have been used. (Limited to one per member.)
refund.section2Body:
Monthly plans: refund = paid amount − (days used × daily rate) − 10% processing fee.

Example: $2.99/month, 10 days used → $2.99 − (10 × $0.10) − $0.30 ≈ $1.69 refund.

Yearly plans: months used × full monthly rate (NOT the discounted rate) is deducted from the refund.
refund.step1: My Page → Billing → click "Cancel" (stops next renewal).
refund.step2Suffix: with your order ID and account email.
refund.step3: Processed within 3–10 business days per the payment provider's policy (Toss / Paddle).
refund.notRefundable1: Forced cancellation due to Terms violation or account suspension
refund.notRefundable2: Payments made using someone else's identity or fraud-detected payments
refund.section5Body: Disputes about this policy are governed by Korean law and adjudicated in the court specified by the Korean Civil Procedure Act. For international users, Paddle's refund/dispute policies may also apply.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro:
These Terms govern your use of Moa AI Ledger (the "Service") operated by ATM Store Co., Ltd. (the "Company"). Signing up indicates acceptance.

Note: This English text is a summary. The Korean version (한국어) is authoritative and prevails in any conflict of interpretation.

a1.title: Article 1 (Purpose)
a1.body: These Terms set out the rights, obligations and responsibilities of the Company and members regarding use of the Service.

a2.title: Article 2 (Definitions)
a2.body:
1. "Service" means the Moa AI Ledger web and mobile application and related services.
2. "Member" means a person who agrees to these Terms and enters a use contract with the Company.
3. "AI features" means functions that call external AI models (Anthropic Claude etc.) to classify, summarize, or coach.
4. "Content" means all data members enter or upload (expenses, photos, reviews, reflections).

a3.title: Article 3 (Effect & amendment)
a3.body:
1. These Terms take effect upon being posted in the Service.
2. The Company may amend these Terms within applicable laws. Material amendments are notified at least 30 days in advance; ordinary amendments at least 7 days in advance.
3. Continued use after the amendment effective date constitutes acceptance.

a4.title: Article 4 (Account creation)
a4.body:
1. The use contract is formed when an applicant accepts these Terms and the Company approves the application.
2. The Company may refuse applications that use false identity, are under 14 years old without guardian consent, or have fraudulent purpose.

a5.title: Article 5 (Member obligations)
a5.body: Members must not: impersonate others, register false information, copy or distribute Service content without consent, collect other members' personal data, disrupt Service operation, or violate any law.

a6.title: Article 6 (Company obligations)
a6.body: The Company strives to provide stable Service, protect personal data, and respond to member inquiries promptly.

a7.title: Article 7 (Service provision)
a7.body: The Company provides AI-assisted ledger input, calendar management, place reviews, monthly AI coaching, data export, and multi-language / multi-currency support. The Service runs 24/7 but may be suspended for maintenance or force majeure.

a8.title: Article 8 (Service changes & suspension)
a8.body: The Company may change or suspend any part of the Service. Members will be notified at least 30 days in advance, except in urgent cases where post-notification applies.

a9.title: Article 9 (Paid service & recurring billing)
a9.body:
1. Some features require payment. Pricing and benefits are posted on the Pricing page.
2. Subscriptions auto-renew unless cancelled. A notice is emailed 7 days before the next charge.
3. Payments are processed by Toss Payments (Korea) or Paddle.com Market Limited (international) as Merchant of Record. The Company does not store card numbers or expiry dates.

a10.title: Article 10 (Withdrawal & refund)
a10.body:
1. Members may withdraw a subscription within 7 days of payment for a full refund, unless more than 30% of paid features have been used.
2. Refunds after the 7-day window follow the separate Refund Policy.
3. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 3–10 business days.

a11.title: Article 11 (AI features)
a11.body:
1. The Service transmits member-entered text and images to external AI providers (Anthropic Claude etc.) for classification, OCR and coaching.
2. Transmitted data is stripped of identifying fields (email, name) and is requested not to be used for model training.
3. AI output is for reference only; the Company does not guarantee accuracy or completeness. Members are responsible for reviewing AI results.
4. See the Privacy Policy for full details.

a12.title: Article 12 (Data ownership)
a12.body: Members own the Content they input. The Company processes Content only to provide the Service and never shares it with third parties without explicit consent. Members may export their data via My Page → Export.

a13.title: Article 13 (Intellectual property)
a13.body: Design, source code, trademarks, logos, and Company-created content are owned by the Company. Members must not commercially reproduce or redistribute such content without prior written consent.

a14.title: Article 14 (Use restriction & termination)
a14.body: The Company may restrict use or terminate membership for Terms violations, harm to others, willful disruption of the Service, or illegal acts. Members may file an objection within 14 days of notice.

a15.title: Article 15 (Withdrawal & data deletion)
a15.body: Members may withdraw at any time. Upon withdrawal, all Content is permanently deleted with no recovery. Export your data before withdrawal if needed. Records required by law (payment history, dispute logs) are retained for the legally mandated period and then destroyed.

a16.title: Article 16 (Limitation of liability)
a16.body: The Company is not liable for: force majeure, member fault, content accuracy entered by members, or financial decisions based on AI output.

a17.title: Article 17 (Personal data)
a17.body: Personal data handling is governed by the separate Privacy Policy.

a18.title: Article 18 (Governing law & jurisdiction)
a18.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea. Disputes are adjudicated in the court specified by the Korean Civil Procedure Act.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro:
ATM Store Co., Ltd. (the "Company") respects member privacy and complies with the Korean Personal Information Protection Act, the Act on Promotion of Information and Communications Network Utilization, and related laws.

This Privacy Policy describes how the Company collects, uses, stores and destroys personal data in connection with the Moa AI Ledger service.

Note: This English text is a summary. The Korean version (한국어) is authoritative and prevails in any conflict of interpretation.

s1.title: 1. Purposes of processing
s1.body: The Company processes personal data for: member identification and fraud prevention; service delivery (ledger storage, AI classification, coaching, calendar, place pins); payment processing for paid plans; customer support; service improvement via anonymized analytics; and legal compliance (e-commerce, tax).

s2.title: 2. Categories of personal data
s2.body:
Required (at signup): email, password (one-way hash), nickname, country / language / currency.

Optional: profile photo, monthly income / budget, last geo location (if consented).

Generated during use: expense records, place records (name, address, rating, reviews, photos), monthly reflection text, recurring expense rules.

Auto-collected: IP, browser / device info, access timestamps, page visited, cookies and localStorage.

Payment (for paid users): collected directly by the payment provider; the Company only stores result, card brand and last 4 digits.

The Company does not collect sensitive data (race, religion, political views, health, criminal record etc.) under Article 23 of the PIPA.

s3.title: 3. Retention periods
s3.body:
Personal data is held until the processing purpose is achieved. By statute the following are retained separately:

① Member signup data: deleted upon withdrawal (anti-fraud hash kept for 30 days)
② Payment / transaction records: 5 years (E-Commerce Act §6)
③ Consumer complaint / dispute records: 3 years (E-Commerce Act §6)
④ Credit info collection/processing records: 3 years (Credit Information Act §20)
⑤ Display / advertising records: 6 months (E-Commerce Act §6)
⑥ Access logs and IP: 3 months (Communications Privacy Act §15-2)

Upon withdrawal, ledger content (expenses, photos, reflections) is permanently and immediately deleted with no recovery.

s4.title: 4. Third-party provision
s4.body: The Company does not provide personal data to third parties by default. Exceptions: (i) prior member consent, (ii) legal request following proper process, (iii) provision in non-identifiable aggregated form for research / public interest.

s5.title: 5. Outsourced processing & cross-border transfer
s5.body:
The Company outsources processing to the following recipients; some involve cross-border transfer. Outsourcing contracts under PIPA §26 prohibit use beyond agreed purposes, require technical / managerial safeguards, and restrict re-outsourcing.

[Recipient / Purpose / Country / Items / Retention]

① Anthropic, PBC (USA) — AI classification / coaching — Ledger text with identifiers removed — Per provider policy; the Company requests no model-training use
② Resend, Inc. (USA) — Password reset / system emails — Recipient email and message body — Destroyed after send
③ Google LLC (USA) — Google Maps Geocoding — Place name / address (no PII) — Destroyed after send
④ Render Services, Inc. (USA) — Backend hosting — All member data — Deleted upon withdrawal
⑤ Vercel Inc. (USA) — Frontend hosting — Static assets and access logs — Per Vercel policy, 30 days
⑥ Toss Payments (Korea) — Domestic payment processing — Payment info — 5 years per E-Commerce Act
⑦ Paddle.com Market Limited (UK / USA, coming soon) — International payment processing — Payment info — Per provider policy
⑧ Cloudflare, Inc. (USA, when enabled) — Photo storage on R2 — Member-uploaded photos — Deleted upon withdrawal

Members may refuse cross-border transfer but doing so may limit Service use.

s6.title: 6. Data subject rights
s6.body:
Members may at any time: (i) view their personal data, (ii) correct / delete errors, (iii) stop processing, (iv) withdraw membership and request permanent data deletion, (v) download their own data in machine-readable JSON (akin to GDPR Article 20).

Exercise rights via My Page → Account settings, or by emailing master@aitrend.kr. The Company acts without delay, subject to limits in PIPA §35(4), §36(1), §37(2).

s7.title: 7. Destruction procedures and methods
s7.body:
Procedure: data is moved to a separate database after the processing purpose is achieved and retained per internal policy / law before destruction.
Method: electronic files are permanently deleted by methods preventing recovery; paper documents are shredded or incinerated.

s8.title: 8. Security safeguards
s8.body:
Managerial: internal management plan, periodic staff training.
Technical: bcrypt one-way password hashing, HTTPS encryption in transit, access control, backup / recovery procedures.
Physical: data-center physical-security standards via cloud providers (Render, Vercel, Cloudflare).
Review: security patches and vulnerability checks at least quarterly.

s9.title: 9. Cookies and automatic collection
s9.body:
Purpose: keep you logged in, remember language / currency, anonymized usage analytics.
Opt-out: block via browser settings (some features may be limited).
The Company does not install third-party advertising / tracking cookies.

s10.title: 10. AI features — personal data handling
s10.body:
To provide AI features the Company transmits member-entered text and images to external AI providers (Anthropic Claude etc.).

Transmitted: ledger text and receipt images with email / name removed; monthly reflection text.
Purpose: auto-categorization, OCR, monthly coaching, insight generation.
Retention: per the provider's data retention policy and automatic destruction. The Company explicitly requests the provider not to use this data for model training.
Limits: AI output is reference only and accuracy is not guaranteed.
Opt-out: members can choose manual entry instead of AI features.

s11.title: 11. Data Protection Officer
s11.body: The Company appoints a Data Protection Officer to handle privacy complaints, inquiries and remedies. Members can contact the DPO and department below for all such matters.

s12.title: 12. Changes to this Policy
s12.body: This Privacy Policy may be amended due to changes in law, policy, or security. Changes are announced in the Service at least 7 days in advance, or 30 days in advance for material changes affecting member rights.

privacy.officerDesc: You may also seek remedy at: Korean Personal Information Dispute Mediation Committee (1833-6972, kopico.go.kr), Personal Information Infringement Reporting Center (118, privacy.kisa.or.kr), Supreme Prosecutors' Office Cyber Investigation (1301, spo.go.kr), Korean National Police Cyber Bureau (182, ecrm.cyber.go.kr).
